## LINQER – Complete Packaging Solution
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/qubit-512px.png)
State-of-the-ArtT1 > 100μs   
Single qubit gate fidelity > 99.9%   
Near Neighbour Crosstalk < -100dB
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/cropped-chips-512px.png)
Quantum Processor AgnosticAble to host multiple chips in one packaging. Available for chips in various sizes 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/multiple-devices-at-once.png)
Host Multiple Chips at OnceHost Multiple Chips at Once Measure several devices in one cooldown with our configurable sample kits. 
![LINQER36 exploded view for website page](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/LINQER36-exploded-view-for-website-page-1-scaled-rkg02ap9zspzcbekoy9mdnm7soh1isyabjvjrtea0w.png)
LINQER is a product line of sample holders that is highly-scalable and hosts both RF and DC lines. A patented solution designed with extreme precision to fit a variety of quantum processor sizes with high-end performance output. It currently hosts qubit devices around the globe, saving scarce resources while helping physicists accelerate their quantum development.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/8-600.png)
8-600 RF LinesHighly adaptable and can be easily tailored to any particular setup. Its proprietary design allows mating 100s of RF connections in a matter of minutes 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/non-magnetic-512px.png)
Fully Non-MagneticCarefully designed to be fully non-magnetic and rigorously verified in our quality assurance processes
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/quick-sample-exchange.png)
Quick Sample exchangeChange samples in a matter of minutes, regardless of the number of connectors.

## Unique Advantages
### Scalable to hundreds of lines
The proprietary high-density connectors have a small footprint and allows you to scale up to hundreds of lines in one cryostats.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/LINQER-scalable-to-hundreds-of-lines.jpeg)
### Compatible with most cryostats
With our adjustable attachment brackets, you can easily decide a height and location to fit your mixing chamber.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Adjust-for-your-mxc-layout-scaled.jpg)
### Unique magnetic shielding
We offer variety of multi-layer magnetic shielding setups to suit different devices. 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Unique-magnetic-Shielding-scaled.jpg)

We aim to solve the inevitable problems when scaling quantum bits in superconducting and spin-qubit-based processors through high density components. Stemming from research, we develop novel hardware solutions which simplify the advancements of quantum computers. We offer solutions to research institutes and quantum computing developers worldwide.
